overall.description: A cinematic view of a grand medieval dining hall from a video game, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long tables filled with students in dark robes, and large stained glass windows. The scene is warmly lit by hundreds of candles against stone Gothic architecture, with the camera holding a steady position overlooking the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: standing still at the entrance observing the great hall and students dining at the long tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at the nearest table eating and conversing
group of students seated along the left table engaged in meal

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended by magic forming chandelier clusters above the tables
tall Gothic stained glass window with blue and gold patterns at the far end of the hall
long wooden house tables lined with students and set with plates and goblets
massive stone column with carved details supporting the vaulted ceiling
ornate house shield with serpent emblem mounted on the nearest table
lit wall-mounted torch brackets providing warm ambient light along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent Gothic dining hall filled with students. Floating candle chandeliers illuminate the space with warm golden light, while a large stained glass window glows blue at the far end. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables eating and conversing, with a decorative house shield visible on the nearest table in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a magnificent Gothic dining hall filled with the warmth of a communal feast. It begins by capturing the grand scale of the architecture, where floating candle chandeliers cast a golden glow over students in dark robes. As the eye wanders across the long wooden tables, the focus settles on the lively conversations and a decorative house shield resting in the foreground. The scene then expands toward the far end of the hall, where the warm interior light contrasts with the deep blue radiance of a massive stained glass window.
